source_pr.title: executor: open doubleread close test and fix bug.
source_pr.body: Open an old test and fix double read's bug.

root_cause_explanation: Index lookup double-read runs work in background goroutines. When the executor returns early (closing before reading all rows), workers must exit promptly; otherwise it can cause data races or goroutine leaks. This PR re-enables `TestIndexDoubleReadClose` and fixes the worker lifecycle by refactoring into a task-picking loop (`pickAndExecTask`) that shares a stable txn context and returns on context cancellation.
fix_pattern: Ensure async worker goroutines have a stable parent context and exit on `ctx.Done()`; loop/drain work channels to avoid leaks when the executor closes early.
